creator: fbsdbugs4@sentry.org
text:
I just ran into this problem having discovered that there was an outdated cert.pem from 2015 in /usr/local/etc/ssl and only a cert.pem.sample -> ../../share/certs/ca-root-nss.crt link which is why using fetch for sites with the new Let's Encrypt root certificate were failing.

The package message is wrong.
